title: Item default value by api call
excerpt: Is there any way to set an item default value in specific board by sending api call?

posts.author: idoputer (ido puterkovski)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there any way to set an item default value in specific board by sending api call?

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@idoputer

You could use Make or similar to create a scenario to set values when an item is created with a recipe like this:

image567×460 14.7 KB

posts.author: idoputer (ido puterkovski)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @JCorrell appreciate your fast response.

The thing is that that I want this automation to use as the portfolio solution of Monday.

That’s means that from one specific high level board I want to create a lot of low level projects boards and whenever I create a new item in the high level - an entire low level board will created based on the template.

Additionally I want to set the default values in those low level boards to be connected to the specific item in the high level board automatically.
